title: Implementing rules and regulations
doc_html:
§428.  Implementing rules and regulations

The division may adopt rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act necessary to carry out the provisions of this Chapter.

Acts 1987, No. 925, §1; Acts 1999, No. 302, §1.
doc_text:
§428.  Implementing rules and regulations
The division may adopt rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act necessary to carry out the provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 1987, No. 925, §1; Acts 1999, No. 302, §1.
